name: thermal-fluid-research-workflow
description: Thermal-fluid mechanical engineering research workflow plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Research, write, code, analyze, and present thermal-fluid work.
interface.longDescription: A workflow plugin for thermal-fluid mechanical engineering research. It combines domain-specific judgment for literature review, technical writing, data analysis, research coding, presentations, AI/ML tools, proposals, patents, and commercialization with reusable workflow prompts.
defaultPrompt: Write a technical section with domain rigor.
Review this figure and explain the physics.
